items.title: Hegseth attacks Europe over migration with beach 'invasion' D-Day speech
items.summary: The US defence secretary was speaking in Normandy, 82 years after allied forces launched their operation to liberate Nazi-occupied north-western Europe.

items.title: Struggle Sleeping? These 3 Sleep Habits Are Tied to Signs of Brain Aging, Study Finds
items.summary: How we sleep may have lasting impacts for our brain health as we age. A new University of Arizona study has found that several common sleep behaviors may be linked to signs of brain aging. The study u…
